headline: W. R. Berkley: Capital Appreciation Potential From Its Baby Bonds
summary: W. R. Berkley maintains credit ratings and balance sheet strength, with $44.35B in assets, $3.09B in debt, and $9.75B in equity. Read more on WRB stock here.
